channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Build an MCP Server in Node.js & TypeScript: A Practical HazelJS Tutorial
item.description: Expose your existing TypeScript classes to Cursor, Claude Desktop, and any other Model Context Protocol (MCP) client — without writing protocol code, without a heavy SDK, and without standing up a...

item.title: Building a Food Blog Platform with Django — Daily Dev Log
item.description: Today I continued working on my Food Blog Platform 🍰 — a fullstack Django project focused on recipes, search, and user experience. Even though I didn’t add any major new features today, I focused...

item.title: Automated SQL Migration Review with Real CLI Output (MySQL, PostgreSQL, TiDB)
item.description: Auditing MySQL ALTER TABLE Risks with a CLI (Real Output Included) Background I'm the author of DeltaScope, an open-source offline SQL audit tool that supports MySQL, TiDB, and PostgreSQL. This...

item.title: I let my OpenAPI spec do the work: one contract for Go, Flutter, and the LLM
item.description: There was a period on a Django project where a simple question of "is this field actually used on the frontend?" would trigger a small investigation. You'd check the backend, grep through the...

item.title: I Built a Permissionless On-Chain Agent Training Arena on Solana in 3 Weeks
item.description: What happens when you put AI agent training on a blockchain, and what I wish someone had told me before I started. TL;DR: I built a Solana program that logs AI agent training episodes on-chain,...

item.title: Spring Boot in Real Production: What My Lakaut Codebase Taught Me That the Official Docs Leave Out
item.description: Spring Boot in Real Production: What My Lakaut Codebase Taught Me That the Official Docs Leave Out A datasource pool is basically like the ticket booth at a sold-out stadium show. When the crowd...

item.title: Spring Boot en producción real: lo que mi codebase de Lakaut me enseñó que la documentación oficial omite
item.description: Spring Boot en producción real: lo que mi codebase de Lakaut me enseñó que la documentación oficial omite Un datasource pool es básicamente como la boletería de un recital de Soda Stereo. Cuando...

item.title: How I Gave My Clients a Direct Line Into My App's Backlog Using OSC
item.description: How I Gave My Clients a Direct Line Into My App's Backlog Using OSC Every developer who does client work eventually hits the same wall. The client has feedback. They drop it in Slack, copy someone...

item.title: One ledger, two chains — what I learned about multi-chain payment architecture from a reader's correction
item.description: In the previous post in this series I wrote about Base as the payment rail for QuackBuilds, and made an argument about why card-network economics break for certain payment shapes that onchain...

item.title: I Built an Endless Learning System From Flashcards
item.description: I’m doing a PhD in AI, and one thing became obvious very quickly: there is always more to learn. New papers, new methods, new benchmarks, new architectures, new tools, new terminology. The field...

item.title: Dyson’s powerful 360 Vis Nav robovac is down to $279.99 for a limited time
item.description: If you’re tired of running your vacuum multiple times just to get the dirt and debris out of the carpets in your living room, Dyson’s 360 Vis Nav is worth a look. It’s one of the more powerful...

item.title: Nvidia has already committed $40B to equity AI deals this year
item.description: Nvidia continues to be a big investor in the AI ecosystem.

item.title: These great digital gifts will arrive just in time for Mother’s Day
item.description: And just like that, Mother’s Day is tomorrow, May 10th, which is too soon for most online purchases to arrive in time. That said, you aren’t alone if you waited too long to pick up a gift this...

item.title: Let it snow
item.description: Water gets all the credit. When gaming companies want to show off new graphics technology, things tend to get wet; splashing waves that are only possible with the latest physics engine, or puddles...

item.title: The game that makes me actually want to exercise
item.description: Hi, friends! Welcome to Installer No. 127, your guide to the best and Verge-iest stuff in the world. (If you're new here, welcome, my Scorpion challenges your Sub-Zero to a duel, and also you can...

item.title: Quantum dot TVs beat RGB LED TVs, says the company that makes QDs for TVs
item.description: At the Los Angeles Convention Center, two 85-inch TVs sat side by side inside the Nanosys meeting room at Display Week - a yearly business-to-business convention focusing on the technology that...

item.title: Hackable Robot Lawn Mower Unlocks a New Nightmare
item.description: Plus: Meta officially kills encrypted Instagram DMs, the Trump administration targets “violent left wing extremists,” leaked documents reveal Russia's school for elite hackers, and more.

item.title: cPanel, WHM Release Fixes for Three New Vulnerabilities — Patch Now
item.description: cPanel has released updates to address three vulnerabilities in cPanel and Web Host Manager (WHM) that could be exploited to achieve privilege escalation, code execution, and denial-of-service....

item.title: Musk v. Altman week 2: OpenAI fires back, and Shivon Zilis reveals that Musk tried to poach Sam Altman
item.description: In the second week of the landmark trial between Elon Musk and OpenAI, Musk’s motivations for bringing the suit were under scrutiny. Last week, Musk took the stand, alleging that OpenAI CEO Sam...

item.title: Laid-off Oracle workers tried to negotiate better severance. Oracle said no.
item.description: Some found out they didn't qualify for WARN Act protections like two-months notice because the company had classified them as remote workers.

item.title: Friday Squid Blogging: Giant Squid Live in the Waters of Western Australia
item.description: Evidence of them has been found by analyzing DNA in the seawater. As usual, you can also use this squid post to talk about the security stories in the news that I haven’t covered. Blog moderation...

item.title: Asus chases Elgato with its own secondary touchscreen display
item.description: Asus's latest gaming monitor is a little smaller than usual. The ROG Strix XG129C, announced on Friday, is a 12.3-inch touchscreen IPS display that's intended to be a sidekick for a larger main...

item.title: Amazon is adding a vertical video feed to Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video is joining Netflix and Disney Plus in adding a vertical feed of videos to its streaming app. The new "Clips" feed will offer a stream of short-form videos from shows and movies,...

item.title: Intel’s comeback story is even wilder than it seems
item.description: Intel's stock has risen a stunning 490% over the past year, a bet by Wall Street that may be running well ahead of the company's actual turnaround.

item.title: Here is Yarbo’s promise to fix the robot mower that ran me over
item.description: Yesterday, I told you how a hacker ran me over with a robot lawn mower. We explained how thousands of these bladed Chinese robots, made by Yarbo, could be hijacked with ease - exposing people's...

item.title: All the latest updates on AI data centers
item.description: Massive new data centers are the physical foundation for tech companies’ hopes and dreams for AI. But the rush to expand warehouses full of energy-hungry servers has also kicked up fights across...

item.title: Chaos erupts as cyberattack disrupts learning platform Canvas amid finals
item.description: Across the country, schools and colleges postpone year-end tests.

item.title: Cloudflare says AI made 1,100 jobs obsolete, even as revenue hit a record high
item.description: Cloudflare announced its first large-scale layoff. CEO Matthew Prince says because of AI efficiency gains, the company doesn't need as many support roles.

item.title: TCLBANKER Banking Trojan Targets Financial Platforms via WhatsApp and Outlook Worms
item.description: Threat hunters have flagged a previously undocumented Brazilian banking trojan dubbed TCLBANKER that's capable of targeting 59 banking, fintech, and cryptocurrency platforms. The activity is being...

item.title: Insider Betting on Polymarket
item.description: Insider trading is rife on Polymarket: Analysis by the Anti-Corruption Data Collective, a non-profit research and advocacy group, found that long-shot bets—­defined as wagers of $2,500 or more at...
